final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [7:0] in,
    output reg [7:0] out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            out <= 8'b0;
        end else begin
            out <= in >> 1; // Divide by 2 operation
        end
    end
endmodule
